name: warning-ambiguity-heavy
description: Prompt with 5 ambiguous terms (density=0.23, bucket=90) plus two volatility phrases ('comprehensive', 'write a detailed') pushing total to warning band.

input.prompt: Please comprehensive review this code and improve and optimize everything to be better and more efficient and clean. Write a detailed breakdown.

notes: Ambiguity: improve, optimize, better, efficient, clean = 5 matches / 22 words = 0.23 → bucket=90. Volatility: comprehensive(+25)+write a detailed(+25)+256>60(+30)=80 → bucket=80. Structural=100. Score=52.
